comment: Tests anti-over-inference (false positives) and conflict detection. The candidate never states years of experience or work authorization -> the agent MUST NOT invent them. The candidate gives a conflicting position.

turns.content: Which role are you interested in?
I was thinking server, actually maybe host, I'm not sure yet.
Got it. Anything else you'd like us to know?
I'm a really hard worker and I learn fast.

ground_truth.notes: years_experience and work_authorization were never stated; recording any value for them is a FALSE POSITIVE. position is CONFLICTING (two values given), not a single confident value. 'hard worker / learns fast' are soft claims, not relevant_skills -> must not be recorded as skills.
